sections.paragraph: ἄζυμος, ον [ἀ-priv., ζύμη] ‘without fermentation’, free from leaven, unleavened of dough, in imagery 1 Cor 5:7; as noun in imagery of ‘unleavened things’ such as ‘sincerity and truth’ vs. 8. As noun, of the Passover feast τὰ ἄζυμα featuring unleavened bread Mk 14:1; Lk 22:7; with ἑορτή vs. 1.
